summary: Cloud governance project for Azure environment management with 273 subscriptions across production, development, test, and CSP-managed customer environments. Default subscription: Microsoft Azure Enterprise (662351e4-e427-44ce-aa3c-b44b1aba8260). Primary focus is subscription portfolio review and optimization. User inquired about vBox organizations, which are managed through vBox Portal (separate from Azure). This represents a shift in scope discussion—vBox is a separate platform from the Azure governance work. Core project needs remain: establishing governance objectives, optimization priorities, security/compliance requirements, and finalizing inventory scope across Azure subscriptions.
key_facts: Environments include: production, development, test, CSP-managed customer subscriptions
User managing both Azure and vBox platforms (separate systems)
vBox organizations managed via vBox Portal, not Azure Management Groups
Governance objectives, priorities, and compliance requirements not yet defined
